meaning: n.[矿]绿宝石,绿松石色,青绿色adj.绿松色的
examples: The sea is an improbably pale turquoise.
The women have elaborate necklaces of turquoise and pink coral.
Some phosphates—vivianite, turquoise, wavellite, etc. are discovered in the oxidation zone.
Here, familes can splash about in the warm turquoise waters against a backdrop of eerie lava fields.
The Parkway's visual highlights also include the glacier-fed, extraordinarily turquoise Peyto and Bow Lakes.
